hero.label: Local-first writing workspace
hero.kicker: AnvilNote keeps editing, math, code, templates, and export in one workspace so you can focus on structuring long-form writing.

valueStrip.1: Use blocks to structure long-form writing without fighting layout
valueStrip.2: Preview, apply templates, and export when the draft is ready

localFirst.title: Local-first by default
localFirst.body: No account is required, and everyday writing is not tied to a cloud service. Documents, drafts, and revisions stay on your machine.

structuredWriting.title: Built for structured writing
structuredWriting.body: It is more than a blank page. Headings, paragraphs, lists, math, code, and images can live in the same document while long-form writing keeps a clear structure.

exportWorkflow.title: One export workflow
exportWorkflow.body: Templates, previews, and export belong to the same workflow. When the note is ready, you do not need to move it into another tool just to finish formatting.

showcase.title: Templates that finish the document
showcase.description:
AnvilNote goes beyond the editor so your content can continue into handouts, reports, and polished notes.
Most templates come from open-source packages in the Typst ecosystem, integrated and ready to use.

closing.title: A quiet workspace for writing, organizing, and finishing.
closing.description: From draft to export, the whole workflow stays in one place. No sign-in and no bouncing between multiple tools.

demo.exportDisabled: PDF export is available in the full workspace

download.title: Download AnvilNote
download.subtitle: Free, offline-first desktop app for macOS, Windows, and Linux.

feedback.title: Share your feedback
feedback.description: Found a bug, or have an idea for AnvilNote? We read every message.
feedback.tooManyImages: You can attach up to 5 images per submission.
feedback.uploadError: Couldn't upload that image. Please try again.
feedback.successMessage: We've received your feedback and sent a confirmation to your email.
feedback.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
feedback.errorRateLimited: You've sent a few messages already — please wait a bit before sending another.
feedback.boardDescription: Browse feedback from the community, or share your own.
feedback.boardEmpty: No feedback yet. Be the first to share.

email.subject: Thanks for your feedback — AnvilNote
email.heading: Thanks for your feedback!
email.introNamed: Thanks, {name}, for taking the time to share your feedback with AnvilNote. We've received your message:
email.introAnonymous: Thank you for your feedback. We've received your message:
email.closing: We read every submission and really appreciate your support.
email.doNotReply: This is an automated message — please don't reply to this email.
email.contactUs: Need to reach us? Find AnvilNote on

in_progress.subject: Your feedback is in progress — AnvilNote
in_progress.heading: We're on it!
in_progress.introNamed: Thanks, {name} — we've started working on your feedback:
in_progress.introAnonymous: We've started working on your feedback:
in_progress.closing: We'll email you again once it's done.

rejected.subject: An update on your feedback — AnvilNote
rejected.heading: An update on your feedback
rejected.introNamed: Hi {name}, after review we won't be moving forward with your feedback:
rejected.introAnonymous: After review, we won't be moving forward with this feedback:
rejected.closing: Thanks again for taking the time to share your thoughts.

done.subject: Your feedback has been resolved — AnvilNote
done.heading: All done!
done.introNamed: Good news, {name} — your feedback has been resolved:
done.introAnonymous: Good news — your feedback has been resolved:
done.closing: Thanks again for helping make AnvilNote better.
